Happy Member of BNB Ecosystem

Flaky is here

HOLDERS REWARD LIVE

Flaky Token ( FLAKY) is a meme token inspired by the beloved Happy Tree Friends character Flaky. Flaky's funky yet loyal and sincere personality reflects the humorous and playful nature of this token. Flaky Token is designed for the community to come together and organize fun events and projects.

CLAIM REWARD

ABOUT FLAKY TOKEN

Tokenomics

Flaky Token Features

No Fees on Buy

In Every Sell Transaction:

  • 3% amount of token is automatically burned.
  • 3% amount of token is automatically added to LP.
  • 2% amount of token is automatically sent to holders.
  • 2% amount of token is automatically sent to marketing wallet

Total Supply

1 Trillion

Blockchain

Binance Smart Chain

Token Distribution

The initial token distribution of the Flaky project is as follows:

  • 30 % Liquidity Pool
  • 10 % CEX
  • 10 % Burn
  • 20 % Game
  • 10 % Early Backers
  • 10 % Airdrop & Incentives
  • 10 % Foundation

Flaky is listed on Coinmarketcap, Coingecko listing is coming very soon !

Flaky World

Imagine a World of Fun and Revenue

Flaky Token was also created to bring Flaky's chilling adventures and entertaining stories to life in the blockchain world.

Limited Supply

Community Powered

Fun Incentives

Loyalty Program

FEATURES

Get ready for a fun and funny blockchain experience with Flaky Token (FLAKY)!

Flaky Token develops and grows with the contributions of community members. You can participate in meme contests, share Flaky's funniest and scariest moments, and vote for the future of Flaky Token. This token brings together Happy Tree Friends fans and new users as a meme token that highlights fun and community engagement.
